verses.1: A Psalm; a Song at the Dedication of the House. A Psalm of David. I will exalt You, LORD, for You have lifted me up, And have not let my enemies rejoice over me.
verses.2: LORD my God, I cried to You for help, and You healed me.
verses.3: LORD, You have brought up my soul from Sheol; You have kept me alive, that I would not go down to the pit.
verses.4: Sing praise to the LORD, you His godly ones, And praise the mention of His holiness.
verses.5: For His anger is but for a moment, His favor is for a lifetime; Weeping may last for the night, But a shout of joy comes in the morning.
verses.6: Now as for me, I said in my prosperity, “I will never be moved.”
verses.7: LORD, by Your favor You have made my mountain to stand strong; You hid Your face, I was dismayed.
verses.8: To You, LORD, I called, And to the Lord I pleaded for compassion:
verses.9: “What gain is there in my blood, if I go down to the pit? Will the dust praise You? Will it declare Your faithfulness?
verses.10: “Hear, LORD, and be gracious to me; LORD, be my helper.”
verses.11: You have turned my mourning into dancing for me; You have untied my sackcloth and encircled me with joy,
verses.12: That my soul may sing praise to You and not be silent. LORD my God, I will give thanks to You forever.
